Stay Alive (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $23,086,480Details
International Box Office $4,479,034
Worldwide Box Office $27,565,514
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,594,049
Total $14,594,049
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,726,406 (46.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,009 opening theaters/2,009 max. theaters, 3.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $42,154,850

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 24th, 2006 (Wide) by Walt Disney
Video Release: September 19th, 2006 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for horror violence, disturbing images, language, brief sexual and drug content.
Running Time: 85 minutes
Plot point: Haunting, Murdered Child, Revenge, Video Game
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
